2026-04-22T18:31:05.1317702Z 
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1317927Z ◆ I now have the root cause for the JavaScript SDK generation failure:
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1318260Z   
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1318523Z   The error is a TypeScript compilation error in the generated samples:
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1318855Z   ```
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1319645Z   samples-dev/employeesUpdateSample.ts(17,73): error TS2345: Argument of type '{ tags: { key7952: string; }; properties: { age: number; city: string; profile: Buffer<ArrayBuffer>; }; }' is not assignable to parameter of type 'Employee'.
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1320500Z   ```
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1320655Z   
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1321591Z   This is a TypeScript type error in the generated sample code - the `Employee` type doesn't match what was provided. The `profile` property type seems to be the issue (it's `Buffer<ArrayBuffer>` but the `Employee` type expects something different).
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1322486Z   
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1322641Z   
2026-04-22T18:31:05.1323408Z   Now I'm compiling the final status update across all the SDK pipelines - Python, .NET, Java, and Go all completed successfully with their respective PRs, but JavaScript failed due to the TypeScript compilation issue I identified.

2026-04-22T18:31:07.7051368Z ##[warning]Node.js 20 actions are deprecated. The following actions are running on Node.js 20 and may not work as expected: actions/github-script@f28e40c7f34bde8b3046d885e986cb6290c5673b. Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 2nd, 2026. Node.js 20 will be removed from the runner on September 16th, 2026. Please check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file. Once Node.js 24 becomes the default, you can temporarily opt out by setting ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
